caption: A white private jet maneuvers along a paved runway in an open grassy field under an overcast sky. A red and white circular logo containing the number "13" appears in the top corners of the frames. In the initial scene, the aircraft is distant, positioned further down the runway. As the sequence progresses, the plane moves closer toward the foreground, turning slightly. Beside the runway, a red windsock flutters in the breeze, and various white airport markers are visible. No people are seen in the frames. By the final scene, the aircraft has advanced significantly, filling more of the frame as it taxis across the asphalt. The background consists of a flat landscape with low-lying green vegetation and distant white structures under a grey sky.
